title: ostodes minor
intro: Ostodes minor, also known as the Chinese angelica, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving circulation, as well as having antimicrobial and antiviral effects. Ostodes minor can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
